site.name: Vigneshwara Novelties
site.description: Your friendly showroom for 1-gram gold jewelry, German silver, pulse chains and gifts.

shop.metaDescription: Browse every piece in our online catalogue — jewelry, silver, and gifts from Vigneshwara Novelties.
shop.title: Browse all
shop.subtitle: Everything we list online. Scroll the grid, use Search for a keyword, or open a collection from the menu.
shop.emptyBody: We are still adding pieces to the website. WhatsApp us and we can share photos and availability from the showroom.

hero.subline: 1-gram gold jewelry, German silver, pulse chains and gift articles — picked by our family for yours.

sections.editorialBody: Vigneshwara Novelties is a family-run showroom in Cherial, Telangana — with more than 20 years in the business. We pick 1-gram gold jewelry, German silver, pulse chains and gift articles ourselves, and explain everything in simple words. Visit us, or just message on WhatsApp.

offers.title: Offers
offers.subtitle: Limited time savings from our family.

about.title: About Vigneshwara Novelties
about.subtitle: A family showroom in Cherial, Telangana — over 20 years in the business.
about.body1: Vigneshwara Novelties is a family-run showroom in Cherial, Telangana — with more than 20 years in the business. One simple idea has stayed with us all this time: beautiful jewelry and gifts should be friendly to buy, not intimidating.
about.body2: We stock 1-gram gold jewelry, German silver pieces, pulse chains, and a wide range of gift articles for festivals, weddings, birthdays and every small moment in between. Everything is hand-picked and priced fairly — and our family is on the other end of every WhatsApp message.
about.quote: Pretty things, simple to buy. That's it.
about.body3: Whether you're looking for a gift for your sister's wedding, a chain for everyday wear, or something special for a festival — come visit our showroom on Cherial Road, or send us a WhatsApp. We're open all 7 days, 10 AM to 8 PM.

contact.title: Visit our showroom
contact.subtitle: Or reach us — we love hearing from you.

footer.subscribeNote: We only message for festivals & new pieces.
footer.description: A jewelry and gift articles boutique. Visit our showroom in Cherial, or browse the collections and request a piece online.

wishlist.emptyBody: Tap the heart on any piece to save it here for later.
wishlist.title: Your saved pieces

search.title: Find a piece
search.noMatchBody: Try a different word, browse a collection, or message us on WhatsApp — we can tell you whether the piece is available in the showroom.
search.hint: Type a piece name, material (silver, gold, brass), or occasion (wedding, festive) to look up the catalogue.

notFound.title: We seem to have lost this piece.
notFound.body: The page you were looking for isn't here. Wander back to the showroom — there's plenty more to discover.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.empty: No questions have been published yet. Check back soon, or message us on WhatsApp below.
faq.noAnswerBody: Send us a WhatsApp message — we usually reply within a few hours.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.body1: We respect your privacy. {name} only collects what we need to call you back — your name, mobile number, and optional address.
privacy.collectBody: When you place an order: your name, mobile number, and optional address and notes. When you browse: anonymous usage stats.
privacy.useBody: To call or WhatsApp you about your order. We do not sell your data and we do not send marketing messages without your permission.
privacy.storeBody: Your details are stored securely with our backend (Supabase) and accessed only by our family.
privacy.removeBody: WhatsApp {phone} or email {email} and we'll remove your details within 24 hours.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: By using {name}, you agree to the simple terms below. We're a family-run shop in Cherial — these terms are written in plain English so everyone understands.
terms.cartBody: Prices on our site are indicative. Final price is confirmed by our team when we call or message you back. We do not take payments online — every order is followed up personally by our family.
terms.mtoBody: Some pieces are made on order. We'll tell you the time needed when we confirm your order — usually 1 to 2 weeks.
terms.returnsBody: You can return or exchange unused items within 7 days at our showroom in Cherial. Customised pieces and used items can't be returned.
terms.qualityBody: We sell 1-gram gold jewelry, German silver, pulse chains and gift articles. We're upfront about every piece's material and finish. Ask us anything before you order — we'll explain.
terms.contactBody: For any question: WhatsApp {phone} or call {phoneAlt}. Email {email}.
